title: Captain Underpants and the Invasion of the Incredibly Naughty Cafeteria Ladies from Outer Space
titleZh: 内裤队长与来自外太空的调皮食堂大妈入侵
author: Dav Pilkey
desc: Evil aliens pose as lunch ladies and turn the school into zombie nerds!

q.en: Who are the three evil space guys that land their spaceship on the school roof?
q.zh: 在飞船降落学校屋顶的三个邪恶外星人是谁？

options.en: Melvin, Mr. Krupp, and Ms. Ribble
options.zh: 梅尔文、克拉普先生和里布尔女士

options.en: Zorx, Klax, and Jennifer
options.zh: 佐克斯、克拉克斯和詹妮弗

options.en: Zorx, Klax, and the gym teacher
options.zh: 佐克斯、克拉克斯和体育老师

options.en: Tom, Dick, and Harry
options.zh: 汤姆、迪克和哈里

explain.en: Inside the spaceship on the roof were three evil space-men named Zorx, Klax, and Jennifer, whose mission was to turn Earth's children into giant evil zombie nerds and take over the world.
explain.zh: 降落屋顶飞船里的三个邪恶外星人叫佐克斯、克拉克斯和詹妮弗，他们的计划是把地球孩子变成巨型邪恶僵尸书呆子，从而统治世界。

q.en: In Mr. Fyde's science class, how did George and Harold get the teacher to leave and see a doctor?
q.zh: 在法伊德老师的科学课上，乔治和哈罗德怎么让老师离开去看医生的？

options.en: They spilled the vinegar on him
options.zh: 他们把醋泼到了他身上

options.en: They did ventriloquist animal noises so he thought he was hearing things
options.zh: 他们用腹语学猫狗叫，让他以为自己幻听了

options.en: They set off the fire alarm
options.zh: 他们拉响了火警

options.en: They hypnotized him with the 3-D Hypno-Ring
options.zh: 他们用3D催眠戒指催眠了他（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

explain.en: George meowed and Harold growled like a dog without moving their lips. Mr. Fyde heard a 'cat and a dog' and worried he was 'hearing things,' so he put on his coat and went to see a doctor.
explain.zh: 乔治学猫叫、哈罗德不动嘴学狗叫。法伊德老师听到“猫和狗”，担心自己“幻听”，于是穿上外套去看医生了。

q.en: What caused the giant wave of green goop to flood the whole school?
q.zh: 是什么导致巨大的绿色黏浆淹没了整所学校？

options.en: The aliens sprayed the halls
options.zh: 外星人喷洒了走廊

options.en: George spilled his science experiment
options.zh: 乔治打翻了他的科学实验（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）（你能在书里找到关于这个的线索。）（这是比较有迷惑性的一个选项。）

options.en: George and Harold taped a fake cupcake recipe (baking soda + vinegar) so the lunch ladies made 500 boxes of soda and 200 bottles of vinegar for the whole school
options.zh: 乔治和哈罗德贴了假纸杯蛋糕配方（小苏打+醋），食堂大妈就为全校做了一千份、用了500盒小苏打和200瓶醋

options.en: A broken water pipe in the kitchen
options.zh: 厨房里的水管爆了

explain.en: George and Harold taped a card saying it was Mr. Krupp's birthday and he wanted cupcakes. The lunch ladies made cupcakes for all ~1,000 people using 500 boxes of baking soda and 200 bottles of vinegar — which erupted in a giant green goop ('KA-LOOEY!').
explain.zh: 乔治和哈罗德贴了张卡片，说那天是克拉普先生的生日、他想吃纸杯蛋糕。食堂大妈就给全校约一千人做蛋糕，用了500盒小苏打和200瓶醋——结果喷出巨大的绿色黏浆（“KA-LOOEY!”）。

q.en: After drinking the Evil Zombie Nerd Juice, what do the kids and teachers look like?
q.zh: 喝了“邪恶僵尸书呆子汁”之后，孩子们和老师变成了什么样？

options.en: Gray and clammy, with taped broken glasses and vinyl pocket protectors (nerds)
options.zh: 皮肤灰白黏腻，戴着胶带缠的破眼镜和塑料口袋保护套（书呆子样）

options.en: Tall and green with antennae
options.zh: 又高又绿，头上长触角（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）（你能在书里找到关于这个的线索。）

options.en: Covered in purple fur
options.zh: 浑身长满紫色毛

options.en: Invisible
options.zh: 隐身了

explain.en: George and Harold noticed the kids leaving the cafeteria were gray and clammy, wearing broken glasses held with masking tape and vinyl pocket protectors — they had all turned into zombie nerds.
explain.zh: 乔治和哈罗德发现从食堂出来的孩子皮肤灰白黏腻，戴着胶带缠的破眼镜和塑料口袋保护套——他们都变成了僵尸书呆子。

q.en: How did Mr. Krupp punish George and Harold for the green-goop disaster?
q.zh: 因为绿色黏浆灾难，克拉普先生怎么惩罚乔治和哈罗德的？

options.en: He sent them to the principal's office
options.zh: 他把他们送到校长办公室（他自己就是校长）（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

options.en: He took away their cafeteria privileges, made them pack their own lunches, and eat in his office
options.zh: 他取消了他们的食堂资格，让他们自己带饭并在他办公室里吃

options.en: He suspended them for a week
options.zh: 他让他们停课一周

options.en: He made them clean the whole school
options.zh: 他让他们打扫整个学校

explain.en: Mr. Krupp couldn't prove they did it but punished them anyway: 'From now on, you boys are going to have to pack your own lunches and eat in my office so I can keep an eye on you!'
explain.zh: 克拉普先生虽没法证明是他们干的，还是罚了他们：“从今以后，你们自己带饭，并在我办公室里吃，好让我盯着你们！”

q.en: During the alien showdown, how did Mr. Krupp end up turning into Captain Underpants?
q.zh: 在与外星人对峙时，克拉普先生是怎么变成内裤队长的？

options.en: Zorx snapped his tentacle-'fingers,' triggering the hypnotic change
options.zh: 佐克斯用触手“手指”打了个响指，触发了催眠变身

options.en: The aliens sprayed him with a ray
options.zh: 外星人用射线喷了他（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

options.en: He ate a zombie nerd cupcake
options.zh: 他吃了一个僵尸书呆子纸杯蛋糕

options.en: George poured water on his head
options.zh: 乔治往他头上泼了水

explain.en: Zorx pointed his tentacle and snapped his fingers (Harold joked that 'tentacles don't have fingers!'), which set off the 3-D Hypno-Ring change and turned Mr. Krupp into Captain Underpants.
explain.zh: 佐克斯伸出触手打了个响指（哈罗德吐槽“触手哪有手指！”），这触发了3D催眠戒指的变身，让克拉普先生变成了内裤队长。

q.en: When the three new 'lunch ladies' applied for jobs, what fake names did they use?
q.zh: 三个新“食堂大妈”来应聘时，用了什么假名字？

options.en: Miss Creant, Mrs. DePoint, and Ms. Ribble
options.zh: 克里恩特小姐、德波因特太太和里布尔女士

options.en: Zoe, Kathy, and Jane
options.zh: 佐伊、凯西和简

options.en: The Three Stooges
options.zh: 三个活宝

options.en: Zorsette, Klaquette, and Jenniferette
options.zh: 佐赛特、克拉奎特和詹妮弗特

explain.en: The aliens posed as 'Zorsette, Klaquette, and Jenniferette,' claiming to be sisters with no experience, credentials, or references — and Mr. Krupp hired them on the spot.
explain.zh: 外星人伪装成“佐赛特、克拉奎特和詹妮弗特”，自称三姐妹，没有经验、没有资历、没有推荐信——克拉普先生当场就雇了她们。

q.en: Inside the aliens' spaceship, what clever switch did George and Harold make to destroy it?
q.zh: 在外星人的飞船里，乔治和哈罗德用什么巧妙的掉包让飞船自毁？

options.en: They threw the juice out the window
options.zh: 他们把果汁从窗口倒掉（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）（你能在书里找到关于这个的线索。）（这是比较有迷惑性的一个选项。）

options.en: They cut the power cables
options.zh: 他们剪断了电源线

options.en: They swapped the Self-Destruct Juice label onto the growth juice and switched the spray-gun and fuel-tank labels, so self-destruct juice filled the fuel tank
options.zh: 他们把“自毁汁”标签贴到生长汁上，并调换了喷枪和油箱的标签，于是自毁汁被灌进了油箱

options.en: They hypnotized the aliens
options.zh: 他们催眠了外星人

explain.en: George put the 'Ultra Nasty Self-Destruct Juice' label onto the Super Evil Rapid-Growth Juice, and Harold swapped the SPRAY GUN and FUEL TANK labels. Jennifer poured what she thought was growth juice (really self-destruct juice) into the fuel tank, blowing up the ship.
explain.zh: 乔治把“超恶心自毁汁”的标签贴到“超级邪恶速生汁”上，哈罗德调换了“喷枪”和“油箱”的标签。詹妮弗把她以为是生长汁（其实是自毁汁）的液体倒进了油箱，飞船就爆炸了。

q.en: Why didn't Captain Underpants's Wedgie Power work on the zombie lunch ladies?
q.zh: 为什么内裤队长的“wedgie 力量”对僵尸食堂大妈没用？

options.en: They were the living dead, and wedgie power doesn't work on the living dead
options.zh: 她们是活死人，而 wedgie 力量对活死人无效

options.en: They were too far away
options.zh: 她们离得太远

options.en: They were wearing too much underwear
options.zh: 她们穿了太多内裤（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

options.en: They were made of metal
options.zh: 她们是金属做的

explain.en: In the comic 'Night of the Living Lunch Ladies,' Captain Underpants tries wedgies but realizes 'Wedgie Power doesn't work on the living dead!' — so he fights them with the Toilet Paper of Justice instead.
explain.zh: 在《活死人食堂大妈之夜》漫画里，内裤队长试了 wedgie，却发现“wedgie 力量对活死人没用！”，于是改用“正义卫生纸”对付她们。

q.en: In the Flip-E-Rama fight chapter, what did Harold use to bonk a bad guy?
q.zh: 在 Flip-E-Rama 打斗章节里，哈罗德拿什么砸晕了一个坏蛋？

options.en: A baseball bat
options.zh: 棒球棍

options.en: A loaf of bread
options.zh: 一条面包

options.en: A rolling pin (George used that)
options.zh: 擀面杖（那是乔治用的）

options.en: A cast-iron frying pan
options.zh: 铸铁平底锅

explain.en: George grabbed a rolling pin and Harold grabbed a cast-iron frying pan before the Flip-E-Rama battle; the pages show 'HAROLD BONKS A BAD GUY' with his frying pan.
explain.zh: 开打前乔治抓起擀面杖、哈罗德抓起铸铁平底锅；Flip-E-Rama 画面里写的就是哈罗德用平底锅“砸晕一个坏蛋”。
